pr.title: Value Residual + Gated Attention + XSA + EMA + AdamW TTT — val_bpb pending H100

output.summary: Adds SwiGLU, value residuals, gated attention, XSA, EMA, and AdamW test-time training to the thwu1 base to refine attention contributions.
output.valOnlyReasoning: Runs three AdamW epochs over validation tokens before evaluation to adapt the model weights and restore afterward.
techniques: Iso-param SwiGLU MLP with GQA-aware attention
Value residuals + gated attention with last-layer XSA
EMA shadow weights + AdamW TTT over validation data
